channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump emphasizes achievements and policy priorities in State of the Union address
item.description: Donald Trump delivered a combative State of the Union address, framing the United States as experiencing a historic economic and social turnaround. He highlighted rising incomes, a growing stock marke...

item.title: Trump Emphasizes Immigration and Economic Record in State of the Union Address
item.description: US President Donald Trump delivered a lengthy State of the Union address at the US Capitol, lasting nearly one hour and 48 minutes, in which he highlighted what he described as the major achievements ...

item.title: Former Nigerian Oil Minister Faces Court Over Alleged Bribery from Oil Executives
item.description: Diezani Alison-Madueke, former Nigerian Minister of Petroleum Resources, is facing trial in the UK over allegations of accepting bribes from two Nigerian oil tycoons, Olajide Omokore and Kolawole Aluk...

item.title: Serie A Faces Possible Absence from Champions League Last 16 After Inter Exit
item.description: Italian football is facing the possibility of having no representatives in the Champions League last 16 for the first time in nearly four decades. Since 1987-88, at least one Italian club has reached ...

item.title: CDC Struggles with Leadership Gaps Amid Ongoing Changes
item.description: The U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) is currently experiencing significant leadership turmoil, following a law change in 2023 that requires the CDC director to be confirmed by the...

item.title: Exploring the Role of AI in BDSM Relationships
item.description: As AI becomes increasingly integrated into various aspects of human life, one of its surprising uses is in BDSM relationships. Some people are turning to chatbots to explore power dynamics, role-play,...

item.title: Flight Disruptions as US and Israel Strike Iran and Regional Airspaces Close
item.description: Flights between Western Europe and the Middle East have been severely disrupted following airstrikes by the US and Israel on Iran. As a result of escalating military action, both Iran and Iraq's airsp...

item.title: Study Finds Seasonal Variation in Sperm Motility Across Different Climates
item.description: A new international study has found that sperm motility, or the ability of sperm to swim effectively, peaks during the summer months and declines in winter. Researchers from the UK, Canada and Denmark...

item.title: Bomb threat against Australian Prime Minister linked to Chinese dance group's tour
item.description: A bomb threat directed at Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese originated from emails connected to the Shen Yun Chinese dance and music group, whose performances are banned in China. The threats...

item.title: Kyren Wilson seals Welsh Open victory with decisive trick shot on final black
item.description: Kyren Wilson produced a moment of brilliance during his match against Liu Hongyu at the Welsh Open, finishing in style with an audacious trick shot on the final black to secure victory and reach a tot...

item.title: The Debate on Conscious AI: Can Machines Ever Achieve Consciousness?
item.description: In his new book, 'A World Appears,' Michael Pollan explores the growing conversation around conscious AI. Although AI systems have become incredibly advanced, Pollan argues that they can never truly a...

item.title: Man Jailed for Murdering Partner After Inflicting 100 Injuries and Trapping Her with Alcohol and Ice Lollies
item.description: Tony Devenport, 57, has been sentenced to at least 22 years in prison for the murder of his partner, Stephanie Blundell, 41, after subjecting her to physical abuse and extreme neglect. The court heard...

item.title: New Book Highlights Radiation Risks and Safety for Professionals
item.description: A new book, 'The Dangers of Ionising Radiation', authored by Dr. Ian Fairlie, provides an in-depth, scientific guide aimed at government agencies, legal professionals, and medical clinicians. Released...

item.title: Shabana Mahmood to continue immigration reform plans following by-election loss to Greens
item.description: Home Secretary Shabana Mahmood has announced plans to continue with immigration and asylum reforms despite Labour's defeat in the Gorton and Denton by-election, where the Green Party gained a once-saf...

item.title: Trump Denies Reports of Top General's Caution on Iran Strikes, Claims Any Action Would Be 'Easily Won'
item.description: President Donald Trump has publicly rejected media reports suggesting that General Dan Caine, Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, advised caution regarding potential US air strikes on Iran. Accordi...

item.title: Two Arrested After Sydney Grandfather Allegedly Kidnapped and Killed in Case of Mistaken Identity
item.description: Australian authorities have arrested two men in connection with the alleged kidnapping and murder of 85-year-old Sydney grandfather Chris Baghsarian, who police believe was taken in a case of mistaken...

item.title: OpenAI terminates employee for alleged insider trading on prediction markets
item.description: OpenAI recently fired an employee for using confidential company information in connection with trades made on prediction markets, including Polymarket. These markets allow individuals to wager on out...

item.title: Robert Carradine's Tragic Death: New Details Revealed About His Struggle with Bipolar Disorder
item.description: Actor Robert Carradine, best known for his role in *Revenge of the Nerds*, tragically passed away this week at the age of 71 after a long battle with bipolar disorder. According to a case file from th...

item.title: Britain's Nuclear Expansion: A Call for Public Protest Against Dangerous Military Investments
item.description: The article discusses Britain's controversial nuclear expansion, particularly the purchase of US nuclear-capable F-35A fighter jets, which are set to be stationed at RAF Marham in Norfolk. The UK's de...

item.title: Man Arrested for Carrying Weapons Including Axe into Manchester Mosque During Ramadan Prayers; Starmer Expresses Concern
item.description: On Tuesday evening, February 24, 2026, a serious security incident occurred at Manchester Central Mosque in the Victoria Park area of south Manchester during Ramadan prayers. Two men entered the mosqu...
